# {{color:1F4E79}}**复杂排版转换器测试文档**{{/color}}

{{color:5A5A5A}}*DOCX fixture for Markdown and TXT conversion*{{/color}}

| {{color:1F4E79}}**测试目的**{{/color}} |
| --- |
| 本文件故意包含标题层级、混合中英文、复杂表格、合并单元格、嵌套列表、代码块、字符画、图片、引用框、脚注式说明和横向宽表，用于测试转换器对 .docx 的转换效果。 |

| {{small}}**文档类型**{{/small}} | {{small}}复杂格式样例{{/small}} | {{small}}**生成日期**{{/small}} | {{small}}2026-07-01{{/small}} |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| {{small}}**语言**{{/small}} | {{small}}中文 + English{{/small}} | {{small}}**目标格式**{{/small}} | {{small}}Markdown / TXT{{/small}} |
| {{small}}**重点**{{/small}} | {{small}}表格、审阅、代码块{{/small}} | {{small}}**风险**{{/small}} | {{small}}样式丢失/顺序错乱{{/small}} |
| {{small}}**状态**{{/small}} | {{small}}测试用例{{/small}} | {{small}}**作者**{{/small}} | {{small}}ChatGPT generated fixture{{/small}} |

# 目录 / Static Table of Contents

| 1. 混合段落与行内样式 | 3 |
| --- | --- |
| 2. 表格压力测试 | 4 |
| 3. 审阅路由样例 | 5 |
| 4. 代码块、字符画与原样展示 | 6 |
| 5. 横向宽表与小统计图 | 7 |
| 附录 A：转换验收清单 | 8 |

注：此目录为静态目录，用于测试转换器是否保留目录文本和页码列。

# 1. 混合段落与行内样式

这一段用于测试行内格式：**粗体**、*斜体*、++下划线++、{{color:C00000}}红色警示{{/color}}、==高亮文字==、English words, numbers 12345, and symbols → ← ✓ ⚠。

脚注式说明：{{small}}这里不是 Word 真实脚注，而是正文中的脚注样式文本，用于测试转换器能否保留小号说明。{{/small}}

## 1.1 多级列表

1. 读取多个 Markdown/TXT 文件

1. 筛选后形成临时书单

1. 选中文本生成 AI 批复

1. 导出 review.md

  - 保留 relative_path

  - 保留段落编号

  - 保留引用原文

| {{color:1F4E79}}**批注框 / Callout**{{/color}} |
| --- |
| 如果转换器只输出纯文本，也应尽量保留“批注框标题 + 批注内容”的顺序。若转换为 Markdown，可用 blockquote 或加粗标题表示。 |

# 2. 表格压力测试

本节包含合并单元格、着色、嵌套内容和不同列宽。

| **表 1：阅读器功能矩阵（合并表头）** |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| {{small}}**模块**{{/small}} | {{small}}**输入**{{/small}} | {{small}}**HTML 表现**{{/small}} | {{small}}**AI 交互**{{/small}} | {{small}}**风险**{{/small}} |
| {{small}}阅读{{/small}} | {{small}}md/txt{{/small}} | {{small}}标题、段落、目录{{/small}} | {{small}}无{{/small}} | {{small}}顺序错乱{{/small}} |
| {{small}}筛选{{/small}} | {{small}}关键词/路径{{/small}} | {{small}}visibleChapters{{/small}} | {{small}}无{{/small}} | {{small}}翻页范围错误{{/small}} |
| {{small}}审阅{{/small}} | {{small}}选中文本{{/small}} | {{small}}dialog 弹窗{{/small}} | {{small}}review.md{{/small}} | {{small}}引用丢失{{/small}} |
| {{small}}表格{{/small}} | {{small}}Markdown table{{/small}} | {{small}}HTML table{{/small}} | {{small}}可复制{{/small}} | {{small}}列错位{{/small}} |
| {{small}}代码块{{/small}} | {{small}}fenced block{{/small}} | {{small}}pre/code{{/small}} | {{small}}原样引用{{/small}} | {{small}}空格丢失{{/small}} |

嵌套表格样例：

```docx-table
{"rows":[[{"text":["左侧说明：嵌套表格常在转换时丢层级。"],"tables":[]},{"text":[],"tables":[{"rows":[[{"text":["key_1"],"tables":[]},{"text":["value_1"],"tables":[]}],[{"text":["key_2"],"tables":[]},{"text":["value_2"],"tables":[]}],[{"text":["key_3"],"tables":[]},{"text":["value_3"],"tables":[]}]]}]}]]}
```

# 3. 审阅路由样例

| {{color:1F4E79}}**审阅项 001：修改**{{/color}} |
| --- |
| 文件：正文/round-02.md<br>位置：第 6 段<br>引用：这里是一段需要被 AI 修改的原文。<br>用户批复：保留意思，但改得更自然，不要像宣传语。 |

| {{color:1F4E79}}**审阅项 002：登记**{{/color}} |
| --- |
| 文件：设定/world-01.md<br>位置：第 2 段<br>引用：本地阅读器只读，不写回源文件。<br>用户批复：登记为安全边界原则，放入 README 的安全说明。 |

以下字段顺序应在转换后尽量保留：文件路径 → 段落编号 → 引用原文 → 动作 → 用户批复。

# 4. 代码块、字符画与原样展示

```text
review:
  enabled: true
  actions:
    - 修改
    - 总结
    - 登记
    - 提取

# CLI
python build_reader.py workspace.config.md --dry-run
```

```text
+--------------------+      +----------------------+
|  reader.html       | ---> |  review.md           |
|  read + filter     |      |  AI-ready tasks      |
+--------------------+      +----------------------+
          |                            |
          v                            v
   human review                  AI modifies md
```

要求：字符画不需要被重绘，转换为 Markdown/TXT 时保留等宽块即可。

# 5. 横向宽表与小统计图

下面的图片用于测试转换器是否保留图片占位、图片说明或 alt 文本。

![Picture 1](data:image/png;base64,)

*图 1：HTML 友好小统计示意图。*

## 5.1 横向宽表

| {{small}}**ID**{{/small}} | {{small}}**文件**{{/small}} | {{small}}**路径**{{/small}} | {{small}}**类型**{{/small}} | {{small}}**字数**{{/small}} | {{small}}**筛选命中**{{/small}} | {{small}}**批复数**{{/small}} | {{small}}**状态**{{/small}} |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| {{small}}001{{/small}} | {{small}}round-01.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-2/round-01.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.md{{/small}} | {{small}}937{{/small}} | {{small}}是{{/small}} | {{small}}1{{/small}} | {{small}}已批复{{/small}} |
| {{small}}002{{/small}} | {{small}}round-02.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-3/round-02.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.txt{{/small}} | {{small}}974{{/small}} | {{small}}是{{/small}} | {{small}}2{{/small}} | {{small}}已验收{{/small}} |
| {{small}}003{{/small}} | {{small}}round-03.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-1/round-03.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.md{{/small}} | {{small}}1011{{/small}} | {{small}}否{{/small}} | {{small}}3{{/small}} | {{small}}待处理{{/small}} |
| {{small}}004{{/small}} | {{small}}round-04.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-2/round-04.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.txt{{/small}} | {{small}}1048{{/small}} | {{small}}是{{/small}} | {{small}}4{{/small}} | {{small}}已批复{{/small}} |
| {{small}}005{{/small}} | {{small}}round-05.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-3/round-05.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.md{{/small}} | {{small}}1085{{/small}} | {{small}}是{{/small}} | {{small}}0{{/small}} | {{small}}已验收{{/small}} |

| {{small}}010{{/small}} | {{small}}round-10.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-2/round-10.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.txt{{/small}} | {{small}}1270{{/small}} | {{small}}是{{/small}} | {{small}}0{{/small}} | {{small}}已批复{{/small}} |
| {{small}}011{{/small}} | {{small}}round-11.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-3/round-11.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.md{{/small}} | {{small}}1307{{/small}} | {{small}}是{{/small}} | {{small}}1{{/small}} | {{small}}已验收{{/small}} |
| {{small}}012{{/small}} | {{small}}round-12.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-1/round-12.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.txt{{/small}} | {{small}}1344{{/small}} | {{small}}否{{/small}} | {{small}}2{{/small}} | {{small}}待处理{{/small}} |
| {{small}}013{{/small}} | {{small}}round-13.md{{/small}} | {{small}}正文/part-2/round-13.md{{/small}} | {{small}}.md{{/small}} | {{small}}1381{{/small}} | {{small}}是{{/small}} | {{small}}3{{/small}} | {{small}}已批复{{/small}} |

# 附录 A：转换验收清单

- ☐ 标题层级是否保留

- ☐ 表格是否变成 Markdown 表格或纯文本表格

- ☐ 合并单元格是否丢失但内容仍在

- ☐ 代码块空格是否保留

- ☐ 审阅项顺序是否完整

- ☐ 图片是否有占位或说明

- ☐ 横向宽表是否没有吞列

| {{color:1F4E79}}**结束说明**{{/color}} |
| --- |
| 本文件内容为测试用虚构材料，可自由用于转换器、阅读器和审阅路由功能测试。 |
